Dear Sir, 
 
 
Whereas, we M/s Yuratech Global Private Limited, Mumbai who are established and reputable 
manufacturers of Thin Clients/Desktop Computers / All in One PC / Other IT Equipment and 
accessories, having factories at 128, Mastermind 1, Royal Palms, Aarey Milk Colony, Goregaon – 
East, Mumbai – 400065.  
 
We hereby confirm that we are manufacturers of desktop computers and are attaching our 
Udyam Registration Certificate, which verifies our status as manufacturers.  
 
 
Thanking you in anticipation  
 
Yours sincerely 
 
For “YURATECH GLOBAL PRIVATE LIMITED” 
 
 
Yuratech Global Private Limited
